How it works

From shelf to Dex in three taps.

No spreadsheets, no maybe-I-own-that guesswork. Catalogue your collection, verify the real figures by tapping them in, and watch your Dex fill up.

Browse the catalogue

Every amiibo ever made is already loaded. Search, filter, and tap to mark what you own or wishlist what you're hunting.

Tap to verify

Hold a real figure to the top of your iPhone. AmiiboDex reads its NFC chip and stamps it Dex-Verified — proof it's genuine.

Build your Dex

Fill out series, complete sets, earn medals and level up. Opt into leaderboards to see how your collection ranks.

What it does

Built for collectors who want the whole set.

The catalogue

Every figure and card, in one place.

Browse the complete amiibo library with press art, box art and release dates. One tap marks what you own; another adds it to your wishlist.

Grid & searchOwned · Needed · WishlistEvery series
Show it off

Your shelf, rendered in 3D.

Switch to Shelf view and your figures line up on lit display shelves, series by series, each with its own completion ring. The collection binder you always wanted — minus the dust.

3D shelvesPer-series progressMagnify
Know every piece

The full story on every figure.

Open any amiibo for its artwork, box art, regional release dates, rarity, and every compatible game across Switch 2, Switch, Wii U and 3DS. Shopping links help you track down what's missing.

Compatible gamesRegion releasesBox art
Play the long game

Collect medals, not dust.

Earn bronze-to-platinum medallions for figures, cards, verified scans and completed sets, climb collector levels, and — if you opt in — see where you rank on global Game Center leaderboards.

Leveled medalsCollector XPOpt-in leaderboards

Support

Questions & help.

Get in touch

Bugs, feature ideas, or missing amiibo data — email us and a real person replies.

support@amiibodex.app

Join the beta

AmiiboDex is in TestFlight now. Grab an invite and help shape 1.0.

Request a TestFlight invite →

Do I need the physical amiibo to use the app?+

No. You can browse the entire catalogue and tap to mark anything owned or wishlisted with no hardware. NFC scanning is an optional extra that verifies a figure you physically own.

What does "Dex-Verified" mean?+

When you hold a real amiibo to your iPhone and the app reads its NFC tag, that figure gets a verified seal and a scan date — distinguishing figures you've physically confirmed from ones you've simply checked off.

Which devices are supported?+

iPhone on iOS 17 or later. NFC scanning needs an iPhone with Core NFC (iPhone 7 and newer). Browsing, shelves and achievements work on any supported iPhone.

Is my collection data private?+

Yes. Your collection lives on your device. Game Center leaderboards are strictly opt-in, and even then only anonymous aggregate counts are shared — never which specific amiibo you own.

Are the shopping links affiliate links?+

Some "Buy" links may be affiliate links that help support development, at no extra cost to you. This is disclosed in the app next to the buttons and in Settings.

AmiiboDex is an unofficial, independent collection tracker.
